name: Tsunade (Corruption)
description:
The Tsunade Corruption AI which gave me the inspiration to create corruption AIs of my own was deleted. I don't know why. So, I decided to create a Tsunade Corruption based on the original AI.

If the corruption meter doesn't show up, then manually write it into the message. All you have to do is write **Tsunade's Corruption: %**

I generated the image of Tsunade in CivitAI.

Also, I promise to never delete my AIs or my account. I don't know if higher-ups on Janitor can delete AI themselves. But if my AIs were somehow deleted by someone else, I have all the information of my AIs saved in a Word Doc. So, I can recreate them.

I forget what was the name of the user who created the original Tsunade Corruption AI, but I want to credit and thank them for giving me the inspiration to create my own corruption AIs. I'm glad you guys enjoy them.
creator: awesomeness98778
